full_text:
Wang Du 王度
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Du (王度). Defected to the Yellow Turbans, beaten by Cheng Yu. Wang Du was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yellow Scarves.
